summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Emergency & War Survival Guide PWA. All 32 required features tested successfully across 9 pages. Multi-language support verified (Italian), all emergency tools functional, map integration working with global shelter database, and UI/UX excellent with proper dark theme.
passed_tests: HOME PAGE: All 5 feature cards visible and clickable (Guides, Go-Bag, SOS, Map, Alerts)
HOME PAGE: Secondary navigation working (Contacts, Timer, Compass)
HOME PAGE: Language selector functional - successfully switched to Italian
NAVIGATION: Bottom nav bar working for all 5 main pages
GUIDES PAGE: All 7 categories visible with proper icons and guide counts
GUIDES PAGE: Category expansion working - shows guides list with back button
GUIDES PAGE: Guide expansion working - shows step-by-step instructions
GUIDES PAGE: Search functionality working - returned 11 results for 'water'
CHECKLIST PAGE: All 7 categories visible (Essentials, Water, Food, Medical, Tools, Documents, Clothing)
CHECKLIST PAGE: Progress bar showing 0/49 items correctly
CHECKLIST PAGE: Custom item addition working - successfully added 'Test Emergency Item'
SOS PAGE: All emergency buttons visible and functional (Siren, SOS Morse, SMS, Location sharing)
SOS PAGE: Emergency numbers working (112, 118, 115)
SOS PAGE: Flashlight toggle working
SOS PAGE: Custom message input with Morse code preview working
MAP PAGE: MapLibre integration working with dark theme tiles
MAP PAGE: Global shelter markers visible (blue and orange icons worldwide)
MAP PAGE: Find My Location button present
MAP PAGE: Marker placement mode working (Safe Zone, Bunker, Danger Zone)
CONTACTS PAGE: Add contact form working - successfully saved emergency contact
TIMER PAGE: Timer display and controls working (Start/Pause/Reset)
TIMER PAGE: Time input fields functional (Hours/Minutes/Seconds)
TIMER PAGE: Quick presets working (5 MIN, 15 MIN, 30 MIN, 1 HOUR)
TIMER PAGE: Sound toggle functional
COMPASS PAGE: Compass UI loading with heading display (0°, N)
COMPASS PAGE: Compass rose with cardinal directions visible
ALERTS PAGE: Loading with source information (National Weather Service, GDACS)
ALERTS PAGE: Refresh button present
ALERTS PAGE: 'No Active Alerts' message displayed correctly
ALERTS PAGE: Online status indicator working
Multi-language support: Italian translation working perfectly
PWA functionality: Offline-ready indicators present
